name: Cranberry Nut Loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Sift together in a bowl flour, baking powder, salt, and sugars.
3. Juice the orange and grate the zest into a 1-cup measuring cup.
4. Add oil to the measuring cup with the zest and juice, then add milk until it reaches 3/4 cup (filling the measure).
5. Beat the egg into the mixture and combine it with the dry ingredients.
6. Mix thoroughly and stir in the chopped walnuts and cranberries (cut into 2-3 pieces).
7. Bake in a loaf pan for one hour.
8. Cool. This recipe freezes well.
